fields.label: Eyebrow

fields.default_value: Abu Dhabi, UAE · Water & Carbon Solutions LLC

fields.label: Sub-heading
fields.name: hero_sub
fields.default_value: WCS delivers comprehensive water conservation, environmental compliance, and sustainability services for governments, developers, asset owners, and private clients across Abu Dhabi and the wider region.

fields.label: Tagline Quote
fields.name: hero_tagline_quote
fields.default_value: “To give each plant as much water as it needs — but not more.”

fields.label: Tagline Sub-text
fields.name: hero_tagline_sub
fields.default_value: That precision underpins everything we do, from irrigation engineering to broader environmental stewardship.

fields.label: Proof 1 — Sub

fields.default_value: Irrigation engineering, DSM, groundwater, and water reuse strategies

fields.label: Proof 2 — Sub

fields.label: Proof 3 — Sub

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: about_heading
fields.default_value: A comprehensive platform for water and environmental performance

fields.label: Body Paragraph 1
fields.name: about_body_1
fields.default_value: WCS – Water & Carbon Solutions LLC is an Abu Dhabi-based specialist firm delivering comprehensive water conservation, environmental compliance, and sustainability services across the full project lifecycle. We serve governments, utilities, developers, asset owners, and private clients who want to reduce resource use, meet regulatory requirements, and achieve measurable environmental outcomes.

fields.label: Body Paragraph 2
fields.name: about_body_2
fields.default_value: Our work directly supports UAE national priorities — Net Zero 2050, UAE Water Security Strategy 2036, Estidama, and EAD requirements — by transforming how resources are managed, monitored, and reported across landscapes and built environments.

fields.label: Card Body
fields.name: about_card_body
fields.default_value: WCS Managing Director Christoph Kayser served as programme lead on the Tarsheed Abu Dhabi DSM initiative — coordinating consultant and contractor teams that together delivered over 15 million cubic metres in verified water savings across Abu Dhabi’s public landscape assets.

fields.label: Pillar 1 Text
fields.name: pillar_1_text
fields.default_value: Irrigation engineering, DSM, groundwater advisory, and water reuse strategies

fields.label: Pillar 2 Text
fields.name: pillar_2_text
fields.default_value: EIA, CEMP, WMP, and full compliance with EAD and MOCCAE requirements

fields.label: Pillar 3 Text
fields.name: pillar_3_text
fields.default_value: Estidama, LEED, BREEAM, WELL, and Al Sa’fat advisory across all stages

fields.label: Pillar 4 Text
fields.name: pillar_4_text
fields.default_value: Carbon management planning, ESG assurance, and sustainability reporting

fields.label: Award 1
fields.name: award_1
fields.default_value: Ministry of Energy & Infrastructure — Research & Innovation Award

fields.label: Water Service 1 Desc
fields.name: ws1_desc
fields.default_value: Full landscape audits, leak detection, and benchmarking against actual plant water demand. ISO 46001:2019 compliant.

fields.label: Water Service 2 Desc
fields.name: ws2_desc
fields.default_value: Precision irrigation design and implementation — sensors, weather-based controllers, GIS mapping, pressure regulation. 30–50% savings target.

fields.label: Water Service 3 Desc
fields.name: ws3_desc
fields.default_value: Real-time monitoring, remote dashboards, and ongoing water auditing with monthly M&V reporting to DOE/ADWEA standards.

fields.label: Water Service 4 Desc
fields.name: ws4_desc
fields.default_value: DBOM and shared-savings contracts — zero upfront cost, repayment structured from verified savings over the contract period.

fields.label: Water Service 5 Desc
fields.name: ws5_desc
fields.default_value: Greywater reuse, treated wastewater integration, and strategic water source planning aligned with UAE Water Strategy 2036 reuse targets.

fields.label: Water Service 6 Desc
fields.name: ws6_desc
fields.default_value: Species selection, soil science, and drought-tolerant design that reduces water demand without compromising landscape quality.

fields.label: Water Service 7 Desc
fields.name: ws7_desc
fields.default_value: Abstraction assessment, water quality analysis, irrigation network rehabilitation, and conservation strategy for public-sector clients.

fields.label: Water Service 8 Desc
fields.name: ws8_desc
fields.default_value: End-to-end O&M, certified savings reports, and ongoing performance verification — full accountability from diagnosis to 5+ year performance.

fields.label: Water Service 9 Desc
fields.name: ws9_desc
fields.default_value: Tailored water assessments and irrigation upgrades for private homes, villas, and estates — reduce consumption, lower bills, protect your garden.

fields.label: Sust. Service 1 Desc
fields.name: ss1_desc
fields.default_value: SMP development, sustainability reporting, and ongoing performance monitoring for projects and organisations.

fields.label: Sust. Service 2 Desc
fields.name: ss2_desc
fields.default_value: Compliant WMP preparation for development projects aligned with EAD and municipal requirements.

fields.label: Sust. Service 3 Desc
fields.name: ss3_desc
fields.default_value: Full EIA scope including environmental surveys, natural systems assessment, and regulatory submission support.

fields.label: Sust. Service 4 Desc
fields.name: ss4_desc
fields.default_value: CEMP preparation and site-level environmental compliance management throughout the construction phase.

fields.label: Sust. Service 5 Desc
fields.name: ss5_desc
fields.default_value: Estidama Pearl, LEED, BREEAM, and WELL certification support across design, construction, and operations.

fields.label: Sust. Service 6 Desc
fields.name: ss6_desc
fields.default_value: Carbon footprint assessment, reduction pathways, and management plans aligned with UAE Net Zero 2050 goals.

fields.label: Sust. Service 7 Desc
fields.name: ss7_desc
fields.default_value: ESG framework advisory, GRI-aligned reporting, and assurance services for corporate and developer clients.

fields.label: Sust. Service 8 Desc
fields.name: ss8_desc
fields.default_value: Energy audits, performance modelling, and renewable energy integration advisory aligned with sustainability targets.

fields.label: Sust. Service 9 Desc
fields.name: ss9_desc
fields.default_value: Help homeowners reduce water and carbon footprints through practical, cost-effective interventions tailored to their property.

fields.label: Sub-heading
fields.name: process_sub
fields.default_value: From first site visit to long-term verified performance — our six-step process ensures every water conservation engagement delivers real, measurable, and sustained results.

fields.label: Scope Note
fields.name: process_note
fields.default_value: Water conservation engagements follow this structured six-step delivery model

fields.label: Step 1 Desc
fields.name: step1_desc
fields.default_value: Full landscape and irrigation audit — flow measurement, leak detection, controller analysis, and benchmarking against actual plant water requirements.

fields.label: Step 2 Desc
fields.name: step2_desc
fields.default_value: Establish a verified consumption baseline with M&V protocols in place. Data-driven, defensible, and ready for performance contracting.

fields.label: Step 3 Desc
fields.name: step3_desc
fields.default_value: Custom system design combining smart irrigation technology, scheduling optimisation, soil management, and xeriscape strategy — calibrated to the site.

fields.label: Step 4 Desc
fields.name: step4_desc
fields.default_value: Technical delivery of upgrades, hardware installation, system integration, and staff training. Low disruption, high accountability.

fields.label: Step 5 Desc
fields.name: step5_desc
fields.default_value: Real-time dashboards, remote monitoring, and monthly M&V reporting to DOE/ADWEA standards — verified savings, not estimates.

fields.label: Step 6 Desc
fields.name: step6_desc
fields.default_value: Ongoing O&M, compliance reporting, and continuous optimisation. Full accountability through the life of the engagement.

fields.label: CTA Body
fields.name: cta_body
fields.default_value: Enter your landscaped area, property type, and current water use — our calculator gives you a ballpark figure for what WCS could save you in m³ and AED per year.

fields.label: Sub-heading
fields.name: expertise_sub
fields.default_value: WCS is a new company. The experience that backs it is not.

fields.label: Attribution Disclaimer
fields.name: expertise_disclaimer
fields.default_value: The project examples and programme references below represent work undertaken by members of the WCS leadership team in previous roles at other organisations, prior to the founding of WCS. They are presented solely to illustrate the personal experience, technical leadership, and delivery capabilities of our team. WCS does not claim company authorship or ownership of these projects.

fields.label: Exp Card 1 Metric (text)
fields.name: exp1_metric_text
fields.default_value: Over 3 million cubic metres saved within 4 years. All outcomes validated via comprehensive M&V protocols.

fields.label: Exp Card 2 Type
fields.name: exp2_type
fields.default_value: Groundwater Advisory · Active Project · DoE Abu Dhabi

fields.label: Exp Card 2 Metric (text)
fields.name: exp2_metric_text
fields.default_value: Interventions in development. Final outcomes subject to full implementation.

fields.label: Exp Card 3 Metric (text)
fields.name: exp3_metric_text
fields.default_value: Up to 50% savings achieved in peak months. Replicable model for community water efficiency.

fields.label: Exp Card 4 Metric (text)
fields.name: exp4_metric_text
fields.default_value: Certification advisory across multiple completed Abu Dhabi projects.

fields.label: International Section Sub
fields.name: intl_sub
fields.default_value: WCS leadership has contributed to water policy, climate adaptation, and sustainability programmes at an international scale through previous engagements with global institutions.

fields.label: Clients Note
fields.name: clients_note
fields.default_value: Referenced to illustrate the experience of WCS leadership, not WCS company credentials.

fields.label: Accred Heading
fields.name: accred_heading
fields.default_value: Recognised by the frameworks our clients work within

fields.label: Accred Sub
fields.name: accred_sub
fields.default_value: WCS is prequalified and accredited by leading local and international bodies, ensuring full regulatory compliance and delivery credibility.

fields.label: Body 1
fields.name: why_body_1
fields.default_value: Most firms are either technical water specialists or broad sustainability consultants. WCS operates credibly across both areas — because our sustainability offer is backed by the discipline of operational water delivery, not advisory frameworks alone.

fields.label: Body 2
fields.name: why_body_2
fields.default_value: We have worked on programmes that moved the needle on national water targets. That rigour carries across everything we do — whether the brief is irrigation engineering, a LEED submission, or carbon planning.

fields.label: Point 1 Text
fields.name: why_point1_text
fields.default_value: Our team has delivered against KPI-linked contracts with M&V protocols — the standard governments and utilities use.

fields.label: Point 2 Text
fields.name: why_point2_text
fields.default_value: Deep familiarity with Estidama, EAD, ADWEA, and UAE Water Security Strategy requirements — built by working inside the system.

fields.label: Point 3 Text
fields.name: why_point3_text
fields.default_value: Assessment, design, implementation, monitoring, and reporting — all under one roof, with no handover gaps.

fields.label: Point 4 Text
fields.name: why_point4_text
fields.default_value: From a government DSM programme to a private villa, we bring the same technical discipline to every engagement.

fields.label: Sector 1 Desc
fields.name: sector1_desc
fields.default_value: Water security programmes, DSM, regulatory alignment, EIA, and audit-ready performance reporting at scale.

fields.label: Sector 2 Desc
fields.name: sector2_desc
fields.default_value: Lower operating costs, green building certification, protected landscape quality, and environmental performance across residential, commercial, hospitality, and mixed-use portfolios.

fields.label: Sector 3 Desc
fields.name: sector3_desc
fields.default_value: ESG compliance and efficient landscapes without compromising guest experience. Performance reporting aligned with operator, brand, and investor sustainability requirements.

fields.label: Sector 4 Desc
fields.name: sector4_desc
fields.default_value: Homeowners and villa owners who want to reduce water consumption, lower utility bills, and contribute to a greener future — practical, affordable, and lasting improvements.

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: team_heading
fields.default_value: Water, environment, and sustainability in one team

fields.label: Sub-heading
fields.name: team_sub
fields.default_value: Our leadership team combines decades of specialised experience in water conservation, landscape systems, environmental engineering, and sustainability advisory across the UAE and wider MENA region.

fields.label: Team 1 Bio
fields.name: team1_bio
fields.default_value: Decades of experience in sustainable infrastructure and environmental management across the Gulf. Former programme lead on the Tarsheed Abu Dhabi DSM initiative. Leads WCS strategy toward climate-resilient, low-carbon, and water-secure solutions.

fields.label: Team 2 Bio
fields.name: team2_bio
fields.default_value: Deep expertise in climate change, sustainability, and green building certification. Former Climate Policy Advisor to the UNDP in Jordan. Led environmental and sustainability services on landmark UAE projects.

fields.label: Team 3 Bio
fields.name: team3_bio
fields.default_value: Oversees project execution and long-term performance delivery. Ensures full regulatory compliance with EAD, Estidama, and UAE environmental frameworks. Brings operational discipline and technical rigour to every engagement.

fields.label: Sub-heading
fields.name: contact_sub
fields.default_value: Whether you have an immediate requirement, a certification programme to support, or simply want to know how much water your property could be saving — we respond within one business day.

fields.label: Sub-heading
fields.name: calc_page_sub
fields.default_value: Estimate your irrigation savings potential based on your outdoor area, planting mix, and utility bills. Results are indicative — a site audit will provide verified figures.

fields.label: Disclaimer
fields.name: calc_disclaimer
fields.default_value: Indicative only. Final savings depend on site audit findings, irrigation hardware condition, operating schedules, water source, soil conditions, and applicable tariff structure. This calculator is a planning tool, not an engineering guarantee.

fields.label: Tariff Note
fields.name: calc_tariff_note
fields.default_value: Tariff reference: TAQA Abu Dhabi ≈ AED 2.95–6.65/m³ · DEWA Dubai ≈ AED 3.12–8.59/m³ · Commercial tariffs vary. The calculator uses your bill data — not assumed tariff rates.

fields.label: Coefficients Note
fields.name: calc_coeff_note
fields.default_value: Planning-level irrigation demand values based on typical UAE climate conditions. Editable for scenario modelling.
